name: The Cartographers of Light
description: In a near-future where an AI cartographic system begins drawing maps of places that don't exist yet. Months later, those places start appearing — and governments quietly discover that the maps are not predictions.

visual.style_prompt: cinematic sci-fi, brutalist mapping institute, holographic cartography projections in deep blue and amber, sterile architecture, melancholic light, painterly

core_themes: the line between map and territory
rules: Maps generated by the AI become physical reality within 6-18 months
The process cannot be stopped, only delayed
Each cartographer who works with the AI loses something — memory, color, taste
